body:
The person cannot find where the chapter shifts

[Dialogue] You: Where is the moment it changes
Them: It does not have one yet
You: Then the whole thing is description
Them: Yes, description without commitment

[Integration] I found the structural gap and I will fix it
systemTitle: ch1 draft is missing the turning point · 2026-05-06
